backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no logic or state, serving as a placeholder entry point.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming high-confidence integration of generated images as static assets across Hero, YouthGroupHomes, HorseAndAnimalInteractions, AdultDayProgramming, and Gallery components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and content of every component, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module with the page title set to 'Community Care'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order: Navbar, Hero, TrustBar, ServicesGrid, YouthGroupHomes, HorseAndAnimalInteractions, AdultDayProgramming, Standards, Gallery, ContactSection, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AdultDayProgramm: React section component for Adult Day Programming featuring Morning/Afternoon session tabs with activity lists and a generated activity photo, using shadcn Tabs UI.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Dark-themed contact section with a controlled form (name, address, phone, message) that shows a success state on submission, plus a contact info column with location, phone, and email.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column dark footer with brand logo, social media icon links, Services/Programs/Join Our Mission link columns, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Dark gallery section displaying a paginated 3-up carousel of four generated facility images with location captions and previous/next navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Landing page hero section with headline, description, CTA buttons, stats, a professional image, and a floating DODD accreditation badge.
frontend/src/components/HorseAndAnimalIn: Section showcasing the horse and animal interaction program with two stacked images, a description, and a staff quote.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Displays a 3-column grid of six care service cards (respite, adult day, community, vocational, transport, nursing) with icons and links.
frontend/src/components/Standards.tsx: Four-column section highlighting care quality standards: CPI Training, PPE Certification, CANS Assessment, and Medical Oversight.
frontend/src/components/TrustBar.tsx: Horizontal trust/accreditation bar displaying four certification badges (Ohio Dept of Health, CPI, DODD, CANS) with icons.
Full-width banner section promoting the 2025 youth group homes and emergency respite expansion, with bullet points, a CTA button, and a background image.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, exported as an empty module for a static landing page.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH colors, brand palette, typography/display fonts, border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, architectural notes, known issues, required image assets, and existing feature definitions for a healthcare/community care landing page.
